## What is Wise Agent?

Wise Agent is a real estate CRM that has quietly held the **Forbes Advisor "Best Real Estate CRM"** spot for three years running. It's pitched squarely at solo agents and small teams, with flat-rate pricing and a feature surface that covers contact management, transaction tracking, email and SMS marketing, landing pages, and done-for-you marketing content — all for one monthly fee.

## Who is it for?

Solo agents, part-time agents, and small teams who want a functional CRM without the BoldTrail/Lofty price tag. Especially good for agents who care about transaction management (contract-to-close checklists, document storage, task assignment) and don't want a separate tool for it.

## Strengths

- **Flat-rate pricing** — $49/mo covers the whole feature set; most competitors charge per-user or gate essentials behind upgrades.
- **Transaction management** — templates, checklists, and status tracking from contract to close, built-in.
- **Content library** — dozens of pre-built marketing assets (blog posts, postcards, email sequences) ready to customize.
- **24/7 live support** — actual humans on phone and chat, included at the base tier — a rarity at this price point.
- **14-day free trial** — no credit card required to evaluate.

## What to consider

- UI feels dated compared to BoldTrail, Lofty, or Follow Up Boss — functional, but not beautiful.
- Lead-generation is weaker than all-in-one platforms; you'll still need a separate lead source or IDX provider.
- Not built for 20+ agent teams — works fine up to a handful of agents, then starts to feel under-powered.
- AI features are lighter-weight than the big all-in-one platforms.

## Bottom line

Wise Agent is the pragmatic pick for solo agents and small teams who want a working CRM without overspending. If your budget is under $100/month and you don't need AI-first lead generation, start here before paying 10× for a platform you won't fully use.
